name: agentmind
description: Collaborative multi-agent orchestration for VS Code. Spin up specialized AI agent teams that coordinate through shared task lists and direct messaging.

chatParticipants.name: agentmind
chatParticipants.description: Orchestrate a team of specialized AI agents to tackle complex tasks collaboratively

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Create an execution plan for a task without starting agents

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current team status, active agents, and task progress

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Gracefully stop all agents and the current team

agentmind.maxTeamSize.description: Maximum number of teammate agents allowed in a team

agentmind.autoApproveTaskPlan.description: Automatically approve the lead agent's task plan without user confirmation

agentmind.agentPollingIntervalMs.description: How often each agent checks for new messages and task updates (milliseconds)

agentmind.heartbeatIntervalMs.description: How often each agent writes a heartbeat to its state file (milliseconds)
